introSection: Giant Revolution is a steel launched roller coaster from Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently under construction at Lotte World Adventure Busan - Magic Forest in Gijang, Busan, South Korea.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was announced in November 2025 at Zamperla's booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

fullText:
Giant Revolution is a steel launched roller coaster from Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently under construction at Lotte World Adventure Busan - Magic Forest in Gijang, Busan, South Korea.

The ride was announced in November 2025 at Zamperla's booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.
